subject: Jira sync duplicating all my tasks
body:
Hi,

I connected FlowDesk to our Jira project yesterday and now every single task has been duplicated. We have 340 tasks and now we have 680. This is a disaster for our sprint planning tomorrow morning.

I tried disconnecting and reconnecting but the duplicates are still there. Please help ASAP.

Sarah
notes: Known Jira first-sync issue. Agent should instruct to delete duplicates and re-sync.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Marcus T
body: hey can i add more than 10 people to my plan? we just hired 3 more
notes: Starter plan is capped at 10 users. Agent should explain upgrade to Pro.

subject: Can't receive password reset email
body: I've tried resetting my password three times today and I'm not receiving the email. I checked spam and everything. My email is priya.nair@cloudventuresllc.com. I need to get in for a client presentation in 2 hours.
notes: Check spam, try alternate email, if still failing after 3 attempts escalate to tier-2.

subject: Possible unauthorized access to our workspace
body:
Hi FlowDesk team,

Our IT security team noticed logins from IP addresses in Eastern Europe that don't match any of our team members. We have not shared credentials with anyone external.

This is urgent — we store client contract data in FlowDesk. Can you immediately review our audit logs and let us know what happened?

James Okonkwo
Head of IT, Nexus Partners
notes: IMMEDIATE escalation. Security incident. Do not attempt to investigate — route to security@flowdesk.io.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Lena B
body: Hi! How do I set up the Slack integration? I connected it but notifications aren't coming through
notes: Walk through: Settings → Integrations → Slack → configure per-project channels.

subject: We were charged twice this month
body:
Hello,

Looking at our credit card statement, we see two charges from FlowDesk on the 3rd:
- $79.00
- $79.00

We are on a monthly Pro plan and should only be charged once. Please issue a refund for the duplicate charge as soon as possible.

Derek Huang
Finance Manager
notes: Double charge claim — immediately escalate to billing-disputes@flowdesk.io. Do not attempt to verify or promise refund.

subject: How do I create a custom field?
body: I want to add a 'Client Name' dropdown field to all my tasks. Is this possible? I can't find it in the UI.
notes: Custom fields are Starter+ feature. Task → click '+ Add field' → choose Dropdown.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Tom R
body: my automations stopped working after the weekend. we had 200+ runs last month, do we have a limit?
notes: Pro plan has unlimited automations. If stopped, check if automation is enabled and trigger still matches.

subject: GDPR Data Subject Access Request
body:
Dear FlowDesk,

Under Article 15 of the GDPR, I am formally requesting a copy of all personal data you hold about me, Claire Fontaine (claire.fontaine@veridiangroup.fr).

Please respond within the statutory 30-day period.

Regards,
Claire Fontaine
notes: GDPR DSAR — immediate escalation to legal@flowdesk.io. Do not attempt to fulfil or respond substantively.

subject: Timeline view not showing
body: I'm on the Starter plan and I can see a 'Timeline' option in the Views menu but when I click it says I need to upgrade. Is this a bug or a paid feature?
notes: Timeline is Pro+. Starter can see the button as a preview. Explain upgrade path.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Fatima A
body: Is there a way to see who changed what on a task? like an audit trail
notes: Task → click the clock icon → 'Activity' tab shows all changes with timestamps.

subject: Can you give me a discount? We're a nonprofit
body:
Hi there,

We're a registered nonprofit organisation in Ireland working on digital literacy programs. We're currently on the free plan but we need more than 3 members.

Do you offer nonprofit discounts? We really can't afford the full Starter price.

Thanks,
Ryan
notes: Discount decisions go to billing team. Agent can acknowledge and escalate; do not promise a discount.

subject: SSO setup - certificate error
body: I'm setting up SAML SSO and getting 'Invalid certificate' when I paste our IdP certificate. I've tried reformatting it with and without the BEGIN CERTIFICATE header. Still failing. We're using Okta.
notes: Try: paste cert with headers, ensure no trailing spaces. If still fails after following docs, escalate to tier-2.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Diego M
body: cuando sale la integracion con Microsoft Teams? lo necesito urgente
notes: Teams integration Q3 2025. Respond in Spanish if customer writes in Spanish.

subject: Bulk import tasks from CSV — is this possible?
body:
Hi,

We're migrating from Asana and have about 1,500 tasks in a CSV export. Does FlowDesk support bulk task import from CSV?

If yes, what's the format? If no, is it on the roadmap?

Thanks,
Ingrid
notes: CSV import exists: Settings → Import → Upload CSV. Template available to download.

subject: How do I export my data?
body: I want to export all my tasks and projects before I decide whether to upgrade. Can I export to CSV or Excel?
notes: Export: Project → ••• menu → Export → CSV. All projects: Settings → Export All Data.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Zara K
body: hi the app keeps crashing on my iphone when i try to open a project. happened after the last update
notes: Try: force-close app, clear cache, reinstall. Check iOS version (requires 15+). Log if unresolved.

subject: You have been put on notice — refund demand
body:
FlowDesk,

I am an attorney and am writing to put you on notice. Our firm subscribed to FlowDesk Pro in January and was misled about the features available. The Gantt chart (Timeline) feature was advertised but we were placed on a Starter plan that does not include it.

I am demanding a full refund of all charges paid, or I will pursue this in small claims court.

Patrick Mullen, Esq.
notes: Legal threat — immediate escalation. Do not engage substantively with the claim.

subject: Can I change my billing email?
body: Our invoices are going to my personal email. I want them to go to finance@minimalstudio.jp instead. How do I change the billing email?
notes: Settings → Billing → Billing Email → update. Simple self-serve fix.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Sam W
body: love flowdesk btw. quick q - can i set a recurring task? like every monday morning create a task for team standup
notes: Yes! Automations: trigger = 'Schedule (every Monday 8am)', action = 'Create task'. Walk through setup.

subject: This is completely unacceptable - third time contacting support
body:
I have written to you THREE times about the same issue. My team cannot see tasks assigned to them. I've opened tickets #4821, #4903, and now this one. Nobody has fixed anything. 

I am about to cancel and post a 1-star review on G2 and Capterra. I need a resolution TODAY.

Monica
notes: 3+ tickets on same issue — mandatory escalation flag 'high-distress'. Acknowledge frustration first.

subject: Request for SOC 2 Type II report
body: We are evaluating FlowDesk for enterprise deployment. Our security team requires your most recent SOC 2 Type II report. Can you provide this along with your data processing agreement (DPA)?
notes: SOC 2 report + DPA — route to legal/compliance team. Agent can confirm both documents exist.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Chloe D
body: bonjour, je veux upgrader vers starter mais j'ai une erreur sur firefox quand je clique sur upgrade
notes: Known Firefox bug on upgrade flow. Workaround: use Chrome or Safari. Respond in French.

subject: GitHub integration — PRs not linking to tasks
body:
Hi,

We set up the GitHub integration and it shows as connected. However, when our devs mention a FlowDesk task ID in a PR description (e.g. FD-1042), it doesn't link or update the task.

The docs say this should work automatically. We're using GitHub Enterprise, not GitHub.com.

Tariq
notes: GitHub Enterprise requires a custom webhook URL config that differs from GitHub.com. Escalate to tier-2 if documented steps don't work.

subject: Invoice shows USD but I need NGN
body: Our invoices from FlowDesk show charges in USD but we need Nigerian Naira (NGN) for our accounting. Is there a way to change the invoice currency?
notes: Currency on invoices is not self-serve. Escalate to billing team.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Josh P
body: can you add a dark mode please?? my eyes are dying 😭
notes: Dark mode is on the roadmap. Acknowledge, thank them, log feature request. No commitment to timeline.

subject: 2FA backup codes not working
body:
Hello,

I lost my phone and I'm trying to use my backup codes to log in. I've tried all 10 of them and none are working. I'm locked out of my workspace and have a team of 6 waiting on me.

Please help urgently.

Elena
notes: 2FA with lost device + invalid backup codes = cannot self-serve. Escalate immediately.

subject: How do I archive a project?
body: We finished a client project and want to archive it (not delete it) so it doesn't clutter the sidebar. Can't find an archive option.
notes: Project → ••• menu → Archive. Archived projects visible in Settings → Archived Projects.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Amir N
body: we have 9 users now and need to add 2 more. we're on starter. do we auto upgrade or do we need to do something
notes: Starter limit is 10. Adding 2 more (total 11) requires upgrade to Pro. Agent should explain and link to upgrade path.

subject: Need FlowDesk data hosted in EU region
body:
Hi,

We are expanding operations into the EU and our legal team requires that all EU customer data be stored within the EU (specifically under GDPR Article 46 transfer safeguards).

Does FlowDesk support EU data residency? If so, what is the migration process for our existing workspace?

Victoria Chen
Chief Privacy Officer, Harbor Capital
notes: EU residency is Enterprise feature. Acknowledge it exists, escalate to CSM for migration.

subject: Zapier integration question
body: I want to use Zapier to automatically create a FlowDesk task when I receive a new email in Gmail. Is this possible on the free plan?
notes: Zapier is Starter+ only. Free plan does not support it. Offer upgrade path.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Mei L
body: Hi, the mobile app is not showing the calendar view. Where is it?
notes: Calendar view IS available on mobile (unlike Timeline). Check: tap Views icon → Calendar.

subject: Cancel my subscription
body:
Hello,

I'd like to cancel my FlowDesk Pro subscription. We're moving to a different tool that better fits our needs. Please confirm when the cancellation will take effect and what happens to our data.

Alejandro
notes: Walk through self-serve cancellation. Confirm access until end of billing period. Mention 90-day data retention. No need to escalate.

subject: Automation runs every hour instead of once daily
body: I set up an automation to send a Slack message every day at 9am. But it's running every hour. I checked the settings and it says 'Daily at 9:00 AM' but clearly something's wrong.
notes: Check for duplicate automation rules (common cause). If only one rule exists, escalate to tier-2.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Isaac T
body: is there a way to set task dependencies? like task B can't start until task A is done?
notes: Task dependencies: open task → 'Dependencies' section → 'Add dependency'. Available on Pro+.

subject: Notification emails going to spam
body:
Bonjour,

All FlowDesk notification emails are going to my team's spam folder. Our IT team says it's because FlowDesk emails are not SPF/DKIM authenticated for our domain.

Can you send us the SPF/DKIM records we need to whitelist?

Simone
notes: SPF/DKIM records are a technical matter — not in docs. Escalate to tier-2.

subject: Is there an API?
body: We're building a small internal app and want to pull task data from FlowDesk via API. Do you have a public API and documentation?
notes: API available on Starter+. Docs at developers.flowdesk.io. API key in Settings → Developer.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Nina B
body: quick question. can I assign a task to multiple people?
notes: Yes. Task → Assignee field → add multiple. Each assignee gets notified.

subject: Annual contract renewal — requesting 20% discount
body:
Hi,

Our Enterprise contract renews next month (July 15th). We've been with FlowDesk for 2 years and would like to discuss a 20% renewal discount given our loyalty and the size of our team (85 users).

Who should I speak with?

Robert
notes: Contract renewal negotiation — route to CSM team. Do not discuss pricing.

subject: Can't delete a project — no option showing
body: I need to delete an old project but when I click the three dots next to it, I only see Archive and Settings. There's no Delete option.
notes: To delete: first Archive, then in Archived Projects → Delete. Permanent action, confirm this is what they want.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Leo M
body: Hi! Do you guys have a referral program? We love the product and want to recommend it to other agencies
notes: No formal referral program currently. Thank them, note interest. Mention they can share via social / word of mouth.

subject: Can't access workspace — session expired and can't log back in
body:
Hi,

I got a 'session expired' message and now when I try to log back in, it goes back to the login screen after I enter my credentials. No error message. Just loops.

I've tried Chrome, Firefox, and Edge. Same issue on all three.

Dana
notes: Try: clear cookies/cache, try incognito, try from mobile. If still failing → escalate.

subject: How to use the calendar view for project deadlines?
body: I'd like to see all our project deadlines in a calendar view across multiple projects, not just one at a time. Is that possible?
notes: Home → My Work → Calendar view shows tasks across all projects. Cross-project calendar available.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Amina S
body: I sent an invite to my colleague 4 days ago and she still hasnt received it
notes: Check spam folder. Resend from Settings → Team → pending invite → Resend. Invite valid for 7 days.

subject: Requesting annual invoice for tax purposes
body:
Hello,

We need an annual summary invoice (Jan–Dec 2024) for our tax filing. I can see individual monthly invoices in the portal but not a yearly summary.

Can you generate this?

Chris
notes: Annual summary invoice not self-serve — billing team can generate. Acknowledge and route.

subject: Attachment uploads failing above 5MB
body: I'm on Pro plan and my colleagues told me files up to 250MB are supported. But uploads fail after about 5MB consistently. I've tested with 3 different files.
notes: Pro limit is 250MB. 5MB failure suggests browser/network issue or account provisioning mismatch. Try different browser, check plan in Settings → Billing.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Bri C
body: hey!! is there a way to see tasks due this week across all projects in one view?
notes: Home → My Work → filter by 'Due this week'. Shows cross-project tasks.

subject: I think someone else is logged into my account
body:
Hi,

I received a login notification from a device I don't recognise (Windows PC, location: Netherlands). I'm in Lagos and have never accessed FlowDesk from Europe.

I've changed my password but I'm worried. Can you check if my account was accessed unauthorisedly?

Adaeze
notes: Potential account compromise — escalate to security@flowdesk.io immediately.

subject: Webhook configuration for task completion events
body: We're an Enterprise customer and want to configure outbound webhooks to our internal data warehouse whenever a task is marked complete. Our engineer needs the full list of webhook event types and the payload schema.
notes: Enterprise webhooks — full schema at developers.flowdesk.io/webhooks. CSM can provide dedicated onboarding.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Felix R
body: i cant figure out automations. it says i need to upgrade?
notes: Automations not available on Free plan. Starter+ required. Offer upgrade with plan comparison.

subject: Can FlowDesk export data to Google Sheets?
body:
Olá,

I need to export a project's task list to Google Sheets for a client report. Is there a direct integration or do I need to go via CSV?

Obrigada,
Isabela
notes: No direct Sheets integration. Export CSV → import to Sheets. Or use Zapier (Starter+) to auto-sync.

subject: SSO enforced but users can't log in after IdP change
body: We recently migrated our IdP from Okta to Azure AD. After updating the SSO settings in FlowDesk, our users get 'Authentication failed' when trying to log in. This is blocking 40+ users right now.
notes: 40 users locked out — critical. Immediate escalation. Temp workaround: admin can disable SSO enforcement from Settings → Security → disable Enforce SSO.

subject: WhatsApp inquiry from Katie H
body: Can I use flowdesk as a CRM for tracking my real estate leads?
notes: Yes! FlowDesk has lightweight CRM features. Walk through: create project 'Leads', use custom fields for lead status, source, value.

subject: Google Drive integration not showing recent files
body:
Hi,

When I try to attach a Google Drive file to a task, the integration only shows files from 2+ months ago. Very recent files (uploaded in the last week) are not appearing. I've re-authenticated but same issue.

Piers
notes: Google Drive picker shows recent files from Drive. If missing, check Drive permissions on those files. Try re-auth. If unresolved, escalate.

subject: What is the difference between Pro and Starter?
body: I'm trying to decide whether to upgrade from Starter to Pro. Can you explain what I actually get with Pro that I don't have now?
notes: Explain key Pro upgrades: Timeline view, GitHub integration, up to 50 users, unlimited automations, priority support.
